data.title: Nigerian investors blindsided by massive CBEX Ponzi scheme
data.description:
Thousands of Nigerians have lost millions to a fraudulent digital asset trading platform, CBEX, which operated as a Ponzi scheme. Early reports from local media outlets placed total investor losses at ₦1. 3 trillion (approximately $800 million), with the funds allegedly sitting in a Tron wallet believed to be associated with CBEX
source: https://cryptoslate.com/nigerian-investors-blindsided-by-massive-cbex-ponzi-scheme/

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Dip, But Traders Remain Optimistic For One Reason
data.description:
Major cryptocurrencies are in the red as macro uncertainty and trade war tensions weigh on sentiment. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/04/44824778/bitcoin-ethereum-xrp-dogecoin-dip-but-traders-remain-optimistic-for-one-reason?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Dogecoin Price Eyes Reversal Amid THIS Bullish Pattern Forming?
data.description:
Dogecoin (DOGE) price shows early signs of a potential trend shift as an inverse Head and Shoulders (H&S) pattern forms on the 4-hour chart. The market formation represents a bullish sign that could serve as a finishing point to the ongoing negative price trend.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/15/dogecoin-price-eyes-reversal-amid-this-bullish-pattern-forming/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 84,000 USDT with a 1.19% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 15, 2025, 19:46 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 84,000 USDT and is now trading at 83,980.507813 USDT, with a narrowed 1.19% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 1,600 USDT with a 2.41% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 15, 2025, 19:28 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 1,600 USDT and is now trading at 1,599.5 USDT, with a narrowed 2.41% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Scam Alert: Ethereum L2 zkSync Flags Compromised Admin Account
data.description:
The latest ecosystem update shows that the decentralized finance (DeFi) space has suffered a major exploit. Per the update, zkSync, a notable Ethereum Layer 2 project, experienced a breach involving one of its admin accounts.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/15/scam-alert-ethereum-l2-zksync-flags-compromised-admin-account/

data.title: XRP Rallies 17% In A Week, But Is The 'Market Top' In Sight?
data.description:
XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) is back in the spotlight with a strong 17% weekly rally. Traders are growing increasingly optimistic about a potential ETF approval, but not everyone is convinced the move has more room to run. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/04/44823714/xrp-rallies-17-in-a-week-but-is-the-market-top-in-sight?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Swedish MP pushes for national Bitcoin reserve as U.S. and EU debate strategic adoption
data.description:
Dennis Dioukarev believes Sweden should strengthen its currency reserves by including Bitcoin alongside traditional assets.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/swedish-mp-pushes-for-bitcoin-reserve/

data.title: Potential Zcash Delisting on Binance Raises Industry Alarms
data.description:
The privacy-focused blockchain's native token appeared on a Binance delisting list alongside FTX's FTT token.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/potential-zcash-delisting-on-binance-raises-industry-alarms
